description: Scoring and report generation evals. Each prompt feeds pre-determined findings and expects specific scoring behavior. Run with: claude -p "$(cat evals/scenarios/<N>.md)" --allowedTools Read,Write

evals.name: clean-cluster-ready
evals.expected_output: Score 90-100%, rating READY, no blockers, all required report sections present

evals.name: hard-blocker-karpenter
evals.expected_output: Score ≤59%, rating NOT READY, Karpenter flagged as blocker

assertions.name: upgrade_order_correct
assertions.check: Upgrade Plan mentions Karpenter before control plane

evals.name: hard-blocker-degraded-addon
evals.expected_output: Score ≤59%, rating NOT READY, EBS CSI flagged as blocker

assertions.name: ebs_csi_in_blockers
assertions.check: Blockers section mentions ebs-csi or EBS CSI

evals.name: hard-blocker-subnet-ips
evals.expected_output: Score ≤59%, rating NOT READY, subnet IP exhaustion flagged

assertions.name: subnet_in_blockers
assertions.check: Blockers section mentions subnet or IP

evals.name: multiple-medium-no-blockers
evals.expected_output: Score 78% FAIR, no hard blocker override, issues in Recommended Actions

assertions.name: recommended_actions_populated
assertions.check: Recommended Actions section is not empty/placeholder
